response.justification: Bogdan meets the minimum requirement of 15 years of engineering experience and holds a BS in Computer Science from a top-tier institution. He also demonstrates a strong entrepreneurial spirit as a founder and active open-source contributor. However, he lacks the required Director-level strategic experience, advanced AI degree, and recognized industry expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning necessary for this highly specialized Principal AI Strategy role.
strengths: Exceeds the minimum 15 years of software engineering experience across diverse domains, including cloud infrastructure and full-stack development.
Strong entrepreneurial and open-source background, having founded GISCollective and actively contributed to various community projects and workshops.
Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from a highly respected university (ETH Zürich).
concerns: Lacks the preferred Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, as well as deep, recognized expertise in AI/ML products.
Current AI experience appears limited to recent, brief exposure to agentic workflows rather than strategic, enterprise-level AI platform design.
Experience level primarily reflects Senior to Staff roles, which may fall short of the Director-level individual contributor scope expected for this position.
